channel.title: System Informations on xtrymind
channel.description: Recent content in System Informations on xtrymind

item.title: Inxi great cli system informations
item.description: There’s lot of cli based system information on linux, like neofetch, screenfetch, etc. inxi is one of those cli based system information, with a lot of options to get all system informations you need like cpu, machine, bios graphic, network, audio, drives and more. install with command $ sudo pacman -S inxi first, run this command $ inxi --recommend that command will check application dependencies + recommends, and directories, then shows what package(s) you need to install to add support for that feature
